IMPORT_VANILLA_SAVES-IMPORT_BUTTON.label: Import Profile
IMPORT_VANILLA_SAVES-IMPORT_CONFIRM_POPU:
All data in [gold]Modded Save Profile {Id}[/gold] will be lost, and it will be replaced by the data from [gold]Unmodded Save Profile {Id}[/gold].

[red][sine]This cannot be undone.[/sine][/red]

[green]This may take a while.[/green]
